title: tutor/quiz-bank.json
description: Spaced-repetition items. scripts/quiz.mjs is the writer of record for interval, due, and history. See docs/FORMAT.md.

id.$comment: module prefix + slug; ids must be unique (quiz.mjs enforces on seed).

interval.$comment: Whole days. quiz.mjs: correct -> max(2, round(prev*2.5)); partial -> 2; wrong/tutored/seed -> 1.

due.$comment: ISO date; due when today >= due.

result.$comment: Grades only for NEW writes: correct|partial|wrong|tutored. 'rescheduled' is LEGACY — bookkeeping that predates the moves[] field; kept in the enum so pre-migration instances stay valid (reality wins until `npm run quiz -- migrate`). New reschedules land in moves[], never here.

moves.$comment: Optional. Bookkeeping that is not a grade — reschedules. Kept out of history[] so history stays grades-only. quiz.mjs is the writer of record (reschedule appends here; migrate moves legacy rescheduled history entries here).

to.$comment: The new due date. Present for reschedules quiz.mjs performs; OMITTED for entries migrated from legacy history, where the destination date is unrecoverable.
